warning: AI-assisted extraction. Verify against official legislation before product approval, export, or customer declaration.

rules.foodCategory: Not specified
rules.limit: Verification required against the Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA) Online Database (Codex STAN 192-1995).
rules.sourceTitle: Food Additives DB (GSFA Online) | CODEXALIMENTARIUS FAO-WHO
rules.notes: The GSFA sets forth conditions for permitted food additive use in all foods. Provisions are searchable by food additive (name, synonym, INS number), functional class, and food category. Users are encouraged to consult the Preamble for interpretation.

rules.foodCategory: Not specified
rules.limit: Verification required against the General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995).
rules.sourceTitle: Contaminants | CODEXALIMENTARIUS FAO-WHO
rules.notes: The Codex maximum level (ML) is the maximum concentration legally permitted. Codex works to keep these levels as low as possible based on sound scientific evidence. Examples of contaminants with established MLs include mycotoxins, metals (arsenic, lead, mercury), and radionuclides.

rules.foodCategory: seasonings and condiments
rules.limit: Verification required against the Code of Practice for the Prevention and Reduction of Mycotoxins in Spices (CXC 78-2017).
rules.sourceTitle: Contaminants | CODEXALIMENTARIUS FAO-WHO
rules.notes: This Code of Practice provides guidance for the prevention and reduction of mycotoxin contamination specifically in spices.

rules.foodCategory: All foods
rules.limit: Verification required
rules.sourceTitle: Database - Food Safety - European Commission
rules.notes: Approved food additives and their conditions of use must be verified against the Union list of food additives in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

rules.foodCategory: All foods
rules.parameter: Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
rules.limit: Verification required
rules.sourceTitle: Microbiological criteria - Food Safety - European Commission
rules.notes: Food safety criteria defining the acceptability of a product or batch of food must be met as laid down in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

rules.foodCategory: All foods
rules.limit: Verification required
rules.sourceTitle: Microbiological criteria - Food Safety - European Commission
rules.notes: Process hygiene criteria indicating the correct functioning of the production process must be met as laid down in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.
